response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and excels in architecture, AI-agent infrastructure, and cross-platform development. His open-source contributions, testing expertise (Vitest-like tools), and cloud/DevOps experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) exceed expectations. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Kotlin/Java in recent roles, and basic German, but these are outweighed by his proven adaptability and depth.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and custom test frameworks
Strong DevOps and open-source contributions with Docker, CI/CD, and testing tools (Vitest-equivalent)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in recent roles; may require onboarding time
Kotlin/Java experience is historical and not recent; relevance to current backend needs is uncertain
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in Berlin-based teams
